title: Skypiea Sees the Storm
description: Enel sets the Ark Maxim and his storm clouds against Skypiea while Luffy, Nami, and the others realize the island itself is in danger.
scene: Across pages 6, 7, 8, 9, this scene focuses on Luffy, Enel, Nami, Wyper, Aisa. Enel sets the Ark Maxim and his storm clouds against Skypiea while Luffy, Nami, and the others realize the island itself is in danger.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Deathpica will expel extremely volatile lightning clouds!

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: What did you... Do just now...?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Just because you think you're God!?

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: Now then! It's time to eliminate you!

summary: Enel sets the Ark Maxim and his storm clouds against Skypiea while Luffy, Nami, and the others realize the island itself is in danger.
